metadata.description: yukineko's Claude Code tools. Hosts the harness family: ctxrot (context-rot guard), playbook (project-knowledge retriever), stuckguard (stuck-loop detector), donegate (completion-verification gate), and precommit-audit (pre-commit static audit), all subscription-native.

plugins.name: ctxrot
plugins.description: Context-rot guard: 5 hooks (guard/rescue/restore/preguard/toolguard) + /distill skill + ctxrot-distiller subagent, with a bundled Rust binary. Runs on your Claude subscription; no API key.

plugins.name: playbook
plugins.description: Knowledge retrieval: a UserPromptSubmit hook that scores curated notes against your prompt and injects the relevant ones under a char budget, with a bundled Rust binary. Runs on your Claude subscription; no API key.

plugins.name: stuckguard
plugins.description: Stuck-loop detector: a PostToolUse hook that spots repeated actions and edit thrash and nudges the agent to change approach or ask the user, with a bundled Rust binary. Runs on your Claude subscription; no API key.

plugins.name: donegate
plugins.description: Completion gate: a Stop hook that runs your acceptance checks (build/test/lint) as subprocesses and blocks the stop until they pass, with a bundled Rust binary. Runs on your Claude subscription; no API key.

plugins.name: precommit-audit
plugins.description: Pre-commit static audit: a Stop hook that runs generic checks plus your TOML-configured project rules over the pending diff (shelling out to git and optional linters) and blocks the stop, feeding findings back until clean, with a bundled Rust binary. Runs on your Claude subscription; no API key.
